summary: Frontend testing of mobile hero section refinements for CTA above-the-fold optimization. ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASS. CTA button 'Find My Perfect Venue' is fully visible 314.8px above fold on mobile (390x844). All responsive hiding classes working correctly.

mobile_cta_above_fold.details: CTA button bottom at 529.2px is 314.8px ABOVE viewport bottom (844px). CRITICAL requirement met.

mobile_microcopy_position.details: Microcopy 'Free venue matching. No booking fees.' bottom at 558.8px is 285.2px above fold.

mobile_hero_tagline_hidden.details: Hero tagline 'Find. Compare. Lock.' is HIDDEN on mobile (display: none) with 'hidden sm:block' class.

mobile_hero_subtitle_hidden.details: Hero subtitle paragraph is HIDDEN on mobile (display: none) with 'hidden sm:block' class.

mobile_trust_microline_hidden.details: Trust line 'Trusted by 1,800+ events' is HIDDEN on mobile (display: none) with 'hidden sm:flex' class.

mobile_advanced_toggle_hidden.details: Advanced filters toggle is HIDDEN on mobile (display: none) with 'hidden sm:flex' class.

mobile_chat_button_scroll_behavior.details: Chat button opacity:0 before scroll, opacity:1 after scrolling 600px. Working correctly.

mobile_search_card_no_animation.details: Search card uses 'sm:animate-float-card' - no animation on mobile, animates on desktop.

mobile_tab_text_shortened.details: Nearby tab shows 'NEARBY' text (shortened from 'USE MY LOCATION').

cta_button_text_updated.details: CTA button text is 'FIND MY PERFECT VENUE' (updated from 'FIND MY VENUE').

desktop_layout_unchanged.details: Desktop (1920x800): tagline visible, subtitle visible, advanced toggle visible, search card has float animation.

search_functionality.details: Search flow works: select city + event type + guests → navigates to /venues/search with correct params.

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile hero section refinements verified. CTA button is 314.8px above fold on mobile (390x844). All responsive classes (hidden sm:block, hidden sm:flex) working correctly to hide non-essential content on mobile while preserving desktop layout. Search functionality working. Chat button scroll behavior working (shows after 600px scroll).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - all tests passing. Changes successfully implemented responsive hiding classes and reduced spacing to ensure CTA is above fold on mobile.
